barRaise.topFinding: The body of the codebase had its best cleanup cycle yet, but the head still lies. The uncommitted 0.34.3 + 0.34.4 tree closed four of yesterday's MEDIUM findings outright (the /api/caddy/my-usage shape mismatch, the doubled AI-spend cap, the HOLE_FIELDS sanitize wipe that was nuking per-hole strategy data, and the triple-haversine duplication), plus a stack of LOW carryovers (ts-nocheck reasons, Stripe replay tolerance, the index.html cache-buster sync gate, the Discord regex). That is real, durable forward motion. But the single AI-fixable HIGH that has now been flagged seven straight reviews still has not landed: scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 builds its payload from scratch (audit.findings hardcoded 0/0/0 at line 98, the whole barRaise block nulled at 103-110), so every release wipes the dashboard, and the two 06-01 releases did exactly that again. The pin-completeness launch gate (N6) is still missing and its verifier is still archived. And a new regression appeared: Decision 29 is now double-booked in DECISIONS_NEEDED.md (refresh-path migration at line 9, monetization at line 384), the same slot-collision pattern that was supposedly fixed last cycle. Verdict holds at at-risk on two standing HIGHs, but the trajectory is clearly up. Fix the writer first; it gates the dashboard ever telling the truth, including this report.
